steps.title: Rewrite the percent
steps.content: $247\%$ of $x$ means $2.47x$, so the function is $f(x)=2.47x$ for $x>0$.

steps.title: Classify the graph
steps.content: The expression $2.47x$ has the form $mx+b$, so it is linear. Since the slope $2.47$ is positive, the function is increasing. The answer is D.
